process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: A refined approach to architectural excellence

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We begin by understanding your vision, lifestyle, and requirements through in-depth consultation.

steps.title: Concept Design
steps.desc: Translating ideas into architectural concepts through sketches, mood boards, and 3D visualizations.

steps.title: Design Development
steps.desc: Refining the approved concept with detailed drawings, material selection, and technical specifications.

steps.title: Documentation
steps.desc: Comprehensive construction documents, permits, and tender packages for seamless execution.

steps.title: Construction
steps.desc: Active site supervision and coordination with contractors to ensure design fidelity.

steps.title: Completion
steps.desc: Final walkthrough, handover, and ongoing support to ensure complete satisfaction.

about.title: About Selrahc Architects
about.subtitle: Creating architecture that resonates with people and place
about.mission: Selrahc Architects is a contemporary architecture practice dedicated to creating spaces that inspire, endure, and transform the way people experience their environment. With a portfolio spanning residential, commercial, and interior projects, we bring a holistic approach to every commission.
about.philosophy: Our philosophy is rooted in the belief that great architecture emerges from a deep understanding of context, light, material, and human experience. We approach each project as a unique opportunity to create something meaningful.
about.team: Our team brings together diverse expertise in architecture, interior design, and urban planning, united by a shared commitment to design excellence.
